reason: Insufficient search results for comprehensive research packet

details.search_results_limitation: The provided search results contain only job posting information for Panorama Education positions. They lack the depth required to complete the Research Packet Contract modules.

missing_critical_data.module_a_company_dna: No information on founding story, stated vs. observed values, financial health, or business model details
missing_critical_data.module_b_market_competitors: No competitive landscape, macro trends, or industry analysis provided
missing_critical_data.module_c_recent_intelligence: No funding rounds, earnings, organizational changes, or recent product news in results
missing_critical_data.module_d_role_org_chart: Minimal JD analysis possible; no hiring manager profile, reporting lines, or team structure data
missing_critical_data.module_e_culture_reality_check: No Glassdoor, Reddit, Blind, or employee sentiment data available
missing_critical_data.module_f_intersection_bridge: Cannot map priorities without comprehensive company and role context

available_data_from_search.requirements: 5+ years product management experience, ideally EdTech or B2B SaaS, bachelor's degree in CS/business or related field
available_data_from_search.company_description: Fast-growing technology company focused on helping educators; building interconnected platform for schools and districts

details.recommendation: To deliver a complete Research Packet following the contract specifications, conduct additional searches for: (1) Panorama Education company history and financials, (2) competitive analysis in EdTech, (3) recent news/funding/organizational changes, (4) Glassdoor/Blind reviews, (5) hiring manager LinkedIn profiles, (6) product roadmap and recent launches
